title: The cover letter
content:
A cover letter is a short, single-page note attached to your application. Include one unless the posting says not to.

Structure:
- **Opening** - the role you're applying for and a one-line hook on why you're a strong fit.
- **Body (1-2 short paragraphs)** - two or three concrete achievements that match what the job needs. Don't restate the CV; connect your results to their problem.
- **Close** - a confident line and a thank-you.

Keep it under ~250 words. Address a person if you can find the name. Tailor it to the company - a generic letter is worse than none.

---
